name: sim-bat
description: SIM-BAT — Application de gestion d'entreprise BTP (Niger)

scripts.dev: concurrently -n API,WEB -c blue,green "npm --prefix server run dev" "npm --prefix client run dev"
scripts.build: npm --prefix server run build && npm --prefix client run build
scripts.build:render: npm --prefix server install && npm --prefix client install && npm --prefix server run build:render && npm --prefix client run build
